Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class ContentNotification

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.ContentNotification
public class ContentNotification extends SObject

Java class for ContentNotification complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="ContentNotification">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EntityIdentifierId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EntityType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Nature" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Subject" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Text" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Users" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="UsersId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
